summary: Bot Battle screen bug fixes and feature updates tested successfully. All 8 features verified: single scroll bar (no nested scroll), Quick Play button auto-selects top 5 photos, Photos Selected counter shows 5/5, Start Battle button fixed at bottom above nav bar, loading screen displays with bot emoji and progress bar, loading screen shows correct text, battle starts with Round 1 and all 5 photos.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Single scroll bar - only 1 overflow-y-auto container found, no nested scroll
VERIFIED: Quick Play button appears when 0 photos selected with text '⚡ Quick Play - Auto-Select Top 5 Photos'
VERIFIED: Quick Play auto-selects top 5 photos by dollar value: Mountain Lake ($890M), Ocean Sunset ($750M), Beach Waves ($720M), Forest Trail ($620M), City Skyline ($580M)
VERIFIED: Photos Selected counter shows '5 / 5' in green after Quick Play, '0 / 5' in yellow when empty
VERIFIED: Start Battle button fixed at bottom (y=936 in 1080px viewport) with gradient background
VERIFIED: Loading screen displays full-screen with animated bot emoji (🤖) rotating
VERIFIED: Loading screen shows 'Loading Bot Battle...' and 'Preparing your battle against Easy Bot'
VERIFIED: Loading screen has animated progress bar (purple-pink-red gradient)
VERIFIED: Battle starts successfully showing 'Easy Bot Battle started! Bet: 100 BL' toast
VERIFIED: Round 1 displays with all 5 selected photos and 'Opponent has selected their photo' message
seed_data_creation: None - used existing 7 minted photos for test user
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bot Battle screen updates fully functional. All bug fixes verified: 1) Single scroll (no duplicate scroll bars), 2) Quick Play button works, 3) Start button positioned at bottom, 4) Loading screen displays correctly. User has 7 minted photos with 100% stamina sorted by value.
